en.title: TEST — remove after verify----2 in 1 For Starlink Mini Cable 16.4FT/5M, DC/USB C Charging + Ethernet Cable, Replacement Starlink Mini Power Accessories (18AWG)
en.summary_html: Integrated Cable Design: Combines ethernet + power supply into a single cable (2 in 1 Cable with USB C adapter).Slashes installation time by 50% and reduces potential failure points for outdoor/mobile setups.High-Power & Gigabit Combo: Supports simultaneous 10A power delivery and 1000 Mbps data transmission. Ideal for continuous operation in both stationary deployments and high-mobility scenarios.Easy to Carry：Designed specifically for RVers and boaters, featuring a 40% weight reduction compared to tradictional Starlink cable and enthernet cable.Rugged & Weather-Resistant: Made from premium-grade materials, fully waterproof and designed to withstand rain, snow, and harsh sunlight, it delivers reliable outdoor performance in even the toughest conditions.Hassle-Free Plug & Play Setup: Designed for instant connectivity, this Starlink cable makes installation quick and effortless.
en.description_html:
• Integrated Cable Design: Combines ethernet + power supply into a single cable (2 in 1 Cable with USB C adapter).Slashes installation time by 50% and reduces potential failure points for outdoor/mobile setups.

  • High-Power & Gigabit Combo: Supports simultaneous 10A power delivery and 1000 Mbps data transmission. Ideal for continuous operation in both stationary deployments and high-mobility scenarios.

  • Easy to Carry：Designed specifically for RVers and boaters, featuring a 40% weight reduction compared to tradictional Starlink cable and enthernet cable.

  • Rugged & Weather-Resistant: Made from premium-grade materials, fully waterproof and designed to withstand rain, snow, and harsh sunlight, it delivers reliable outdoor performance in even the toughest conditions.

  • Hassle-Free Plug & Play Setup: Designed for instant connectivity, this Starlink cable makes installation quick and effortless.
